Log:
  New port: chinese/pycangjie

  This is a Python wrapper to libcangjie,
  the library implementing the Cangjie input method.

  WWW: http://cangjians.github.io/projects/pycangjie/

  PR:		223565
  Submitted by:	hello@blubee.me
